items.description: The LORD is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.

items.title: Jeremiah 29:11
items.description: For I know the plans I have for you, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.

items.description: So do not fear, for I am with you; do not be dismayed, for I am your God.
